title: Video by iff_floorball
description:
@worldfloorballgoalieacademy and a new invention for goalie training 🤩👏🏻

Posted @withregram • @worldfloorballgoalieacademy [DECREASING THE SHOOTING ANGLE]

One of the best possible way, how to teach the goalkeeper, how to decrease the shooting angle from the close distance! 😎

It is a combination of a ping-pong robotic shooter, an iPhone camera paired with TV so the goalkeeper can see himself immediately during the shooting drill, and last but not least the gum strings which simulate the shooting angle 💪🏼

The coach is just moving the robotic shooter so the shooting angle is constantly changing and the goalkeeper has to be still trying to cover the best possible amount of free space in his net 💥

I would really appreciate the share and like on this invention 🙏⭐️
